allowedBlocks.note: Parent correctly restricts to CardsGridItem only

template.note: Three empty CardsGridItem blocks inserted by default

parentRestriction.note: CardsGridItem correctly declares takt/cards-grid as parent

context.note: Context properly passes columns from parent to child

contentRenders.note: Verified 10 test variations render correctly on test page

emptyStates.allOptionalEmpty: pass - Test case 8 shows cards with minimal content render correctly
emptyStates.noHeader: pass - Test cases 8, 9 show grid renders without header
emptyStates.noImage: pass - Test case 6 confirms image container completely hidden when no image
emptyStates.noButton: pass - Cards without buttons render correctly

contentExtremes.longHeading: pass - Test case 7 handles long heading gracefully
contentExtremes.manyItems: pass - Test case 10 shows 6 cards in multiple rows
contentExtremes.singleItem: pass - Test case 1 shows single card layout

columnVariations.1column: pass - Test case 5: grid-cols-1 applied correctly
columnVariations.2columns: pass - Test case 4: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 applied
columnVariations.3columns: pass - Test cases 1-3: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 applied

darkMode.withHeader: pass - Test case 3 shows dark mode with charcoal pseudo-element
darkMode.withoutHeader: pass - Test case 9 shows dark mode without header

semanticHtml.headingHierarchy: pass - Uses section > h2 (ThemeHeading) > h3 (card titles)
semanticHtml.buttonsVsLinks: pass - Uses <a> for tertiary buttons with href

ariaAttributes.sectionLabel: pass - aria-labelledby links to heading ID when present
ariaAttributes.autoIds: pass - Auto-generated IDs for anchors and aria relationships

focusStates.linkFocus: pass - btn-tertiary class includes focus styles

screenReader.contentOrder: pass - Logical reading order: header, then grid of cards
screenReader.buttonText: pass - Button text describes action (Learn More, Explore, etc.)

markupDuplication.note: No duplicate markup for mobile/desktop found in TSX or PHP

wrapperClasses.tsx: cards-grid py-10 sm:py-16 [dark bg-transparent! when darkMode]

gridClasses.tsx: grid gap-6 + column-specific classes based on attributes.columns
gridClasses.php: grid gap-6 + column-specific classes based on $columns

cardClasses.tsx: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col
cardClasses.php: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col

buttonArrow.tsx: shrink-0 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green group-focus:bg-charcoal group-focus:text-neon-green
buttonArrow.php: shrink-0 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green group-focus:bg-charcoal group-focus:text-neon-green

header.note: TSX uses shouldDisplay() for editor, PHP only renders if content exists

image.note: Image completely hidden on frontend when no ID set

innerBlocksPattern.verified: Parent uses useInnerBlocksProps with allowedBlocks: ['takt/cards-grid-item'], child has parent: ['takt/cards-grid']

cssGridLayout.verified: Uses grid gap-6 with grid-cols-1, md:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-3 based on columns attribute

darkModeImplementation.verified: Uses 'dark bg-transparent!' on section and pseudo-element on container with 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 md:before:py-24'

tertiaryButtonWithArrow.requirement: Tertiary button with arrow icon using ThemeButton's 'after' prop

imagesOnlyHiddenIfNotSet.requirement: Images only for media, completely hidden if not set
imagesOnlyHiddenIfNotSet.verified: PHP checks if ( $hasImage ) where $hasImage = ! empty( $image['id'] ), TSX uses displayContent || hasImage

equalHeightCards.verified: Card wrapper uses h-full, card container uses h-full flex flex-col, description uses flex-1

tsxPhpSync.requirement: Identical HTML structure between TSX and PHP
tsxPhpSync.verified: All class names, element hierarchy, and conditional logic match between TSX and PHP files

shouldDisplayUtility.verified: CardsGrid.tsx imports and uses shouldDisplay(), CardsGridItem.tsx uses shouldDisplay() for displayContent

passedChecks: Build compiles without TypeScript errors
Both parent (CardsGrid) and child (CardsGridItem) blocks register correctly
All required files present for both blocks
Parent/child relationship correctly configured with context
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
Inner blocks pattern implemented correctly
CSS Grid layout with responsive columns works correctly (1/2/3 columns)
Dark mode implemented using ContentWithMedia pseudo-element pattern
Tertiary button with arrow icon using ThemeButton 'after' prop
Images hidden completely when not set (no empty rectangle)
Equal height cards via CSS Grid and flex layout
TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
shouldDisplay() utility used correctly for editor placeholders
renameBlock() utility used for block naming sync
Semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy
Accessibility: aria-labelledby, focus states, logical content order
No markup duplication detected
Test page contains 10 block variations covering all edge cases
Empty states handled gracefully
Long content wraps properly
notes: CRLF line endings are the only issue found - easily auto-fixable
Block follows established patterns from CardsCarousel correctly
Context system working correctly between parent and child
All spec requirements met and verified
